accountSavedToast: Your notebook is safe under this account now
mergeDoneToast: Notebooks merged — everything's cozy in one place
pendingMigration: A previous merge may not have finished. Your data is safe.

subtitle.save: We'll keep your notebook safe under this account, on every device.
subtitle.signin: Sign in to an account you already have.

errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak — use at least 8 characters
errors.userNotFound: No account found for this email
errors.popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the sign-in window
errors.network: No connection — check your internet and try again
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts — please try again later
errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again

merge.title: This account already exists
merge.bodyLink: An account with these details already exists. Merge your current notebook into it?
merge.bodySignin: Signing in would leave your current notebook behind. Merge it into that account instead?

signOut.title: Sign out?
signOut.body: Your notebook stays safe in the cloud. This device will start a fresh notebook until you sign in again.
